- [x] Verify that the copilot-instructions.md file in the .github directory is created. (Created baseline checklist.)

- [x] Clarify Project Requirements (Confirmed Node.js + Puppeteer API requirements from user message.)

- [x] Scaffold the Project (Initialized Node + Express project, added package.json, base src folder, and installed dependencies.)

- [x] Customize the Project (Implemented Express endpoint, Puppeteer scraper, validation layer, and error handling.)

- [x] Install Required Extensions (No additional VS Code extensions were required.)

- [x] Compile the Project (Ran `node --check` over the key source files to ensure they parse without errors.)

- [x] Create and Run Task (Added VS Code task to run `npm run dev` and verified it launches the server.)

- [x] Launch the Project (Started `npm run dev`, hit `/health` to verify, then stopped the server.)

- [x] Ensure Documentation is Complete (README.md updated and all HTML comments removed from this checklist.)

- Work through each checklist item systematically.
- Keep communication concise and focused.
- Follow development best practices.
